items.title: Aside from Wilson and Swain, Essengue is a really weird player right now. Potential to be a really nasty defender is there but there doesn’t appear to be a single offensive skill besides dribble hard to basket and hopefully draw a foul. Tough to see him getting many real minutes
items.author: Jason Patt
items.body_excerpt: Aside from Wilson and Swain, Essengue is a really weird player right now. Potential to be a really nasty defender is there but there doesn’t appear to be a single offensive skill besides dribble hard to basket and hopefully draw a foul. Tough to see him getting many real minutes to start.

items.title: Dailyn Swain has gotten nothing but backboard on multiple layups tonight and just looks totally lost with no confidence. As awesome as Caleb has been, Swain has been that bad in Vegas. Long way to go for him.

items.title: Scoring got Dailyn Swain this far.
items.author: Julia Poe
items.body_excerpt:
Scoring got Dailyn Swain this far.

But the Bulls rookie wants — and needs — to redefine himself as a glue player to fit into the long-term vision in Chicago.

Here’s how he plans to use summer league as the first step of that transformation:

media.title: Dailyn Swain plans to redefine himself as a playmaker with the Chicago Bulls. Summer league is the first step.
media.description: Dailyn Swain was known in college for his scoring prowess. Now, the No. 15 pick needs to develop on the ball during his rookie season with the Chicago Bulls.

items.title: Bryson crushed it last night. Caleb Wilson was a no-brainer, but I thought Swain was an inspired choice. The draft is about finding the best available talent, while trades and free agency are for fine-tuning fit. Bulls need to add shooting, but they got two dogs with real upside.
items.author: Ricky O'Donnell
items.body_excerpt: Bryson crushed it last night. Caleb Wilson was a no-brainer, but I thought Swain was an inspired choice. The draft is about finding the best available talent, while trades and free agency are for fine-tuning fit. Bulls need to add shooting, but they got two dogs with real upside.

items.title: Swain's slashing leap this year was a thing of beauty. He's a walking paint touch. Shot 47.6 % from mid-range this year and only 5% (!) of those makes were assisted. He brings it defensively and can pass, too. The jumper is slow and a little hitchy, but I like the pick.
items.author: Ricky O'Donnell
items.body_excerpt: Swain's slashing leap this year was a thing of beauty. He's a walking paint touch. Shot 47.6 % from mid-range this year and only 5% (!) of those makes were assisted. He brings it defensively and can pass, too. The jumper is slow and a little hitchy, but I like the pick.

items.title: For the first time tonight, a player with a connection to the Sixers goes off the board. Dailyn Swain from Texas is Chicago's pick at No. 15 overall. Everybody else you have seen mocked to the Sixers over the last few months remains available.
